text.title: Launch Thread — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `LaunchThread` object containing exactly 7 ordered tweets with media slots and CTA.

list.item: `tweets` — array of EXACTLY 7 objects `{position: 1-7, body, char_count, media_url, media_type ∈ {gif, video, image, none}, role ∈ {hook, demo, problem, solve, price, cta, social_proof}}`

antipattern.description: Tweet at position 1 contains URL OR position-6 tweet missing URL.
Position 2 has `media_type: none` OR position 7 has `media_type: none`.
Any tweet `char_count` exceeds the per-position limit.
Social-proof tweet body uses generic praise ("loved by founders", "trusted by indies") without a named quote OR metric.

antipattern.reason: Cannot publish without explicit consent token.

list.item: Substitute `gif` with `video` if upload fails — preserve media presence.
Translate copy into 1 additional language for multi-launch (clone thread, keep structure).
A/B variant of hook ONLY — preserve 7-tweet structure.
Social proof has consent + verbatim quote or metric.
